The '''Lehon system''', once referred to as the '''Rakata system''' or the '''Star Forge system''', was the [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] containing the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]] and the [[Star Forge]]. It was rediscovered by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] while looking for the Star Forge in [[3959 BBY]]. The location of the system was unknown for millennia, and was to be deduced only with the help of the ancient [[Star Map]]s.

[[Abo]], the [[Star/Legends|star]] of the system, was feeding the Star Forge, built by the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] and placed close to the sun. The system afterward became part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Following the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]], the wreckage of the Star Forge and the vessels lost during the battle made the system difficult to navigate. After the [[Jedi Civil War]], the Republic made the entire Lehon system a protected historical site and dictated that it was not to be entered without permission. This lasted until the [[Republic Dark Age]], when the crumbling government could no longer protect the location.
